shortDescription: Bright corner-unit condo in the heart of the St. Lawrence Market district with panoramic city and lake views from the 27th floor.
fullDescription: Experience urban living at its finest in this stunning 27th-floor corner suite. Floor-to-ceiling windows flood the space with natural light and offer breathtaking views of Lake Ontario and the Toronto skyline. The modern open-concept layout features a sleek kitchen with integrated appliances and waterfall island, a generous living and dining area, and two well-proportioned bedrooms each with its own bathroom. The primary bedroom includes a walk-in closet and spa-inspired ensuite. Building amenities include a rooftop terrace, fitness centre, party room, and 24-hour concierge. Steps to the St. Lawrence Market, Union Station, and the waterfront.
keyFeatures: Two full bathrooms including spa-inspired ensuite
One underground parking spot and locker included
Walk score of 98 — steps to transit and shops
